reasoning: The control CM-8 (2) - System Component Inventory | Automated Maintenance is primarily focused on ensuring that cloud instances are managed and maintained through automated systems like SSM (Systems Manager) for patching and compliance. Kubernetes does not directly manage the underlying infrastructure (such as VMs or physical servers) in the same way that cloud providers do. Instead, Kubernetes focuses on orchestrating containerized applications. Automated maintenance of the underlying nodes is typically handled by the cloud provider or through external systems, not directly by Kubernetes itself.
title: System Component Inventory | Automated Maintenance
